$comment: Request body for POST /api/tasks/:id/reject. Spec: docs/05-task-runner/03-hitl-gate.md §JSON Schemas. Version 1.
title: HITL Reject Request Body

reason.description: Rejection rationale. Required (rejection without a why is a misuse). Stored fully in a kind=error detail event written before the status_change; the status_change.reason field carries a truncated 80-char form.

followUp.description: Optional follow-up task carrying the rationale forward. dependsOn is force-cleared to [] by the endpoint (D8 — the rejected task is terminal). resourceClaims defaults to the rejected task's claims if absent on the request (D9).
